title: Collision
description: Coolest Vanilla inspired Minecraft 8x8 resource pack
body:
![Collison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3cd214f2069ac4798bf4dad510311d1e383650f.png)
### This resource pack is currently only for showcase and testing

0% of the project is finished...
We are remaking this project... AGAIN (We aren't satisfied)

##
 
**Collision is a resource pack for Minecraft** that can be played in two versions, **16-bit** (soon) and **8-bit**.

**Collision 8-Bit** convert ALL mobs, items and blocks to 8-bit simplistic style!

You may ask, "**What makes Collision different from other resource packs?**"
The answer is simply by considering your comments
I'm not making Collision, you are!
## 🤔 Q&A
- Why Collision?
  
  **Because this resource pack is supposed to be a combination of vanilla and custom resource pack**
- What versions of Minecraft is Collision for?
  
  **For now, Collision is compatible only with Minecraft Java Edition And Only for 1.21**
- Is there Gonna be a different version of Collision?
  
  **Yes, We plan to make the resource pack available for Java players (from version 1.12.2) and Bedrock players.
It may take time, but it is worth it**
- How can I express my opinion about this resource pack?
  
  **You need to join to our Discord server and simply express your opinion 😊**

OUR DISCORD SERVER [HERE!](https://discord.com/invite/pvEG9ehNdZ)
